src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation import to jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3.x namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 17+/Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Replace javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank with jakarta.validation.constraints.NotBlank to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Remove deprecated @Lob annotation as it is no longer supported or necessary in the new JPA provider version.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: @Lob annotation may be removed or deprecated in newer Hibernate/Jakarta Persistence versions, causing compile warnings or errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with stricter serialization checks in newer JDKs.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: JDK 16+ enables serial annotation checks by default; missing @Serial on serialVersionUID causes compile errors with -Werror or strict compiler settings.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation package.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Replace deprecated JPA getById with getReferenceById to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta Persistence API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: getById is deprecated in JPA 3.1+ and removed in later versions; using it causes compile errors or deprecation warnings that may be treated as errors in strict builds.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
